Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x9F65 "GALIVAN-7F00-9F65" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $7f00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Galivan (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $7F00 to zero out the tape buffer to allow high scores and other data to be initialised correctly. It then sets the line to trigger the raster IRQ on ($D012) to $E0 to avoid possible music sync issues on the title screen. And finally it jumps to the entry point at $9F65 (it couldn't use RTS because of the zeroing overwriting the boot code).
